tier_rationale: Highest LTV-to-CAC for EPOS. Single decision-maker, immediate pain (time leverage), high tolerance for tooling spend that returns hours.
tagline: An expert who sells judgment but is being eaten alive by delivery work.

psychographics.self_identity: I am the product. My thinking is the asset.
psychographics.core_belief: Leverage comes from systems, not headcount.
psychographics.fear: Becoming a glorified freelancer trapped in delivery.
psychographics.ambition: Productize expertise into a recurring engine that doesn't need me daily.
psychographics.status_anxiety: Looking 'small' next to agencies; being seen as just-a-freelancer.

pain_points.pain: Every new client doubles the operational load
No content engine — pipeline depends on referrals
Knowledge stays in head, not in systems
Cannot take a vacation without revenue stopping

desired_outcomes.outcome: 10 hours/week reclaimed from ops to strategy
Predictable inbound pipeline from owned content
Productized offer ladder with clear price tiers
Knowledge captured in a vault that compounds

buying_triggers.trigger: Just turned down a great client because no capacity
Quarterly revenue dipped despite full calendar
Burned out after a launch sprint
Saw a peer announce a productized offer
Read an article about leverage / sovereignty

objections.objection: I don't have time to learn another tool
objections.counter_angle: Show 'first value in 24 hours' install path; quantify hours reclaimed in week 1.

objections.objection: I tried HubSpot/Notion/X — it didn't stick
objections.counter_angle: Position EPOS as an operating system, not a tool; emphasize sovereign ownership and compounding.

objections.objection: My business is too unique for templates
objections.counter_angle: Show that the system learns the operator's voice; templates are seeds, not cages.

objections.objection: Can I get this without monthly fees?

communication_preferences.length: Medium (300-800 words for posts; 1-3 min for video)

conversion_path.awareness: LinkedIn essay or framework post that names their pain ('the consultant trap')
conversion_path.interest: Free diagnostic (TTLG-style scorecard) revealing their leverage gaps
conversion_path.consideration: Mirror Report showing 3-5 specific gaps + recommended order of operations
conversion_path.decision: Sovereign install offer or strategy-installation engagement
conversion_path.retention: Quarterly Mirror Report + content / system upgrades
